file_insights.details: All UI components follow consistent pattern: React.forwardRef wrapper around Radix UI primitives with TailwindCSS styling and cn() utility for className merging
Components properly typed with React.ElementRef, ComponentPropsWithoutRef, and custom interfaces extending HTML attributes
Added 10 new dependencies: class-variance-authority, clsx, tailwind-merge, and 7 @radix-ui packages for component primitives
Central cn() function using clsx and tailwind-merge for className composition and conflict resolution

patterns_discovered.name: Variant Pattern
patterns_discovered.description: Badge and Button use CVA (class-variance-authority) for variant management with default variants

patterns_discovered.name: Radix Primitive Wrapper
patterns_discovered.description: Components wrap @radix-ui primitives (Accordion, Select, Tabs, Slider, etc.) to extend with TailwindCSS styling

patterns_discovered.name: Compound Component Pattern
patterns_discovered.description: Multi-part components exported as separate, composable pieces (Card: CardHeader, CardTitle, CardContent, CardFooter)

patterns_discovered.name: DisplayName Convention
patterns_discovered.description: All components set displayName for React DevTools debugging

gotchas_discovered.description: Accordion component uses data-state=open:animate-accordion-down and data-state=closed:animate-accordion-up animations that must be defined in tailwind.config.js
Components reference CSS color variables (primary, secondary, destructive, accent, ring, etc.) that must be defined in global CSS
Multiple @radix-ui packages added with complex peer dependency requirements; npm install might have resolution warnings
All components depend on utils.ts cn() function; if this function is missing or incorrectly implemented, all components will fail
Select component is 147 lines with nested Radix primitives; requires careful prop forwarding and event handling

approach_outcome.description: Successfully copied all 18 UI components from prototypes-magic to frontend
approach_outcome.completion_status: Complete - all required components copied with proper dependencies installed

recommendations.details: Add accordion animations to tailwind.config.js: @keyframes accordion-down, accordion-up with smooth transitions
Create global CSS file with all required Tailwind color tokens: primary, secondary, destructive, accent, muted, ring, background, card, border, input, foreground variants
Ensure utils.ts properly exports cn() function combining clsx and tailwind-merge for correct className merging
Radix UI components have built-in a11y; test with screen readers and keyboard navigation to ensure proper ARIA attributes
Add Storybook or component documentation showing usage patterns, variants, and props for each component
Verify tsconfig.json has strict mode enabled for better type safety across all components
Verify Input, Select, Textarea, Label, and Checkbox components work correctly in form contexts with validation
